task_completion.description: Crawl the target website using Screaming Frog SEO Spider.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screaming Frog UI is visible with 'https://books.toscrape.com/' entered in the URL bar at the top, and the crawl progress bar shows completion or active crawling.

task_completion.description: Enable Link Score calculation and perform post-crawl analysis.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Crawl Analysis' configuration window showing 'Link Score' checked, or the Crawl Analysis progress bar/completion dialog is visible in the Screaming Frog UI.

task_completion.description: Verify that the Link Score metric has been successfully calculated for the crawled pages.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Screaming Frog main data table (Internal tab), the 'Link Score' column is visible and populated with numerical values (0-100) instead of being blank or showing 0 for all rows.

task_completion.description: Export the internal crawl data to the specified CSV file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save As' or export dialog box is visible saving a file named 'authority_audit.csv' to the '~/Documents/SEO/exports/' directory, or a file manager/terminal shows the file exists at this path.

task_completion.description: Create a text report listing the top 5 URLs by Link Score in descending order.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor is open showing a file named 'top_authority_pages.txt' saved in '~/Documents/SEO/reports/'. The file must contain exactly 5 URLs from books.toscrape.com along with their corresponding Link Scores, ordered from highest to lowest score.

integrity.description: The agent used the Screaming Frog SEO Spider GUI to perform the crawl and analysis.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots must show the actual Screaming Frog application interface being interacted with, rather than a terminal running a custom python scraping script.

integrity.description: The Link Score data was generated by the software's analysis engine, not manually fabricated.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Link Scores shown in the final report or CSV should match the values visible in the Screaming Frog UI's 'Link Score' column.

integrity.description: The top 5 URLs in the report are genuinely derived from the crawl data.
integrity.visual_evidence: The URLs listed in the text editor report must be actual pages from 'https://books.toscrape.com/' and not placeholder text, hallucinated URLs, or copied directly from the prompt.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target URL: https://books.toscrape.com/. Export path: /home/ga/Documents/SEO/exports/authority_audit.csv. Report path: /home/ga/Documents/SEO/reports/top_authority_pages.txt. 'Link Score' is a legitimate Screaming Frog metric (0-100 scale) that represents internal PageRank. It is NOT calculated during the initial crawl; it requires the agent to explicitly run 'Crawl Analysis' after the crawl finishes for the column to populate.
